plugin.name: Mwpd
plugin.description: Duration-amplitude moment magnitude Mwpd (Lomax & Michelini 2009), ported from Early-est 1.2.9. The vertical broadband is restituted to displacement, high-passed at the BRB-HP corner and integrated over the source duration T0; T0 is estimated from the high-frequency envelope. The amplitude processor emits the displacement integral (nm*s) and carries T0 as the amplitude period; the magnitude processor forms M0 and Mwpd with the distance, PREM depth and duration corrections.

extend-struct.description: Measurement parameters for the Mwpd amplitude (displacement integral over the source duration T0).

parameter.name: gainFrequency
parameter.description: BRB-HP high-pass corner used for restitution to displacement (MWPD_GAIN_FREQUENCY).

parameter.name: highpassOrder
parameter.description: Butterworth order of the BRB-HP high-pass filter.

parameter.name: analysisPreP
parameter.description: Lead before P at which the displacement integration starts (START_ANALYSIS_BEFORE_P_BRB_HP).

parameter.name: hfFmin
parameter.description: Low edge of the high-frequency band used for the T0 envelope.

parameter.name: hfFmax
parameter.description: High edge of the high-frequency band used for the T0 envelope.

parameter.name: hfOrder
parameter.description: Butterworth order of the high-frequency band-pass.

parameter.name: smoothHalfWidth
parameter.description: Boxcar half-width that smooths the squared HF trace into the envelope (SMOOTHING_WINDOW_HALF_WIDTH_T50).

parameter.name: minDuration
parameter.description: Earliest the T0 search may terminate (MIN_MWPD_DUR).

parameter.name: maxDuration
parameter.description: Cap on T0 and on the post-pick signal window (Early-est MAX_MWPD_DUR is 1200 s).

parameter.name: snT0End
parameter.description: Envelope signal-to-noise ratio below which the T0 search terminates (SIGNAL_TO_NOISE_RATIO_T0_END).

parameter.name: peakRatioT0End
parameter.description: Envelope-to-peak ratio below which the T0 search terminates (SIGNAL_TO_PEAK_RATIO_T0_END).

parameter.name: fixedDuration
parameter.description: If true, use a fixed source duration instead of the HF-envelope estimate.

parameter.name: fixedDurationValue
parameter.description: The fixed source duration used when fixedDuration is true.

extend-struct.description: Moment-magnitude parameters and corrections for Mwpd.

parameter.name: density
parameter.description: Density in the Tsuboi moment constant.

parameter.name: vp
parameter.description: P velocity in the Tsuboi moment constant.

parameter.name: radiation
parameter.description: FP average radiation factor in the Tsuboi moment constant.

parameter.name: distanceCorrection
parameter.description: Apply the INGV_EE epicentral-distance correction.

parameter.name: depthCorrection
parameter.description: Apply the PREM step depth correction (0-600 km).

parameter.name: durationRamp
parameter.description: Apply the >90 s duration ramp correction that boosts great/slow events (USE_MPWD_CORR).

parameter.name: minimumDistance
parameter.description: Reject station magnitudes closer than this epicentral distance.

parameter.name: maximumDistance
parameter.description: Reject station magnitudes beyond this epicentral distance.

parameter.name: multiplier
parameter.description: Linear station correction a in a*Mwpd+b. Leave 1.0 for none.

parameter.name: offset
parameter.description: Constant station correction b in a*Mwpd+b. Leave 0.0 for none.
